parameters.subject: CMCA Application Received – Action Required
parameters.message:
= CMCA Application Received – Action Required

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Thank you for contacting CMCA Financial Services. We’ve received your request and are ready to begin your application.

To proceed, please complete your application using the secure DocuSign link below. This is the fastest and most efficient way to finalize your submission.

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

No printing or scanning required.

COMPLETE APPLICATION

Once your information is received, our underwriting team will review your file and contact you with the financing options available.

If you have any questions during the process, our team is here to assist you.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
Underwriting & Client Services

CMCA Finance® Corporate Office
309 Lakeshore Blvd. Pointe-Claire, QC H9S 4L6
Phone: 1-855-651-2844
Fax: 1-855-541-6893
www.canadianmerchantcashadvance.ca   underwriting@cmcafinance.com

parameters.subject: Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete Our Review
parameters.message:
= Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Yesterday we sent you a secure DocuSign link to complete your CMCA Financial Services application. We have not yet received your completed form.

To continue with your financing request, please take a few minutes to finalize your application online:

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

No printing or scanning required.

COMPLETE APPLICATION

Once your information is received, our underwriting team will review your file and contact you with the financing options available.

Your information is encrypted and processed securely.

If you have any questions while completing your application, our team is here to help—simply reply to this email or call us at 1-855-651-2844.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

parameters.subject: Documents Needed to Complete Our Review
parameters.message:
= Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Your CMCA application has been securely received through DocuSign and is now moving to the next stage of review.

To continue with your financing request, please take a few minutes to finalize your application online:

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

Final Step

To complete our underwriting review, we require your business bank statements for the previous 2–3 months. Once we receive your statements, our underwriting team will finalize the assessment and prepare the financing options available to you.

If you’d like to discuss next steps or have questions, you may also schedule a call with us. Please let us know the best phone number to reach you and a convenient time for a brief call. We’re here to make this process clear, secure, and efficient.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

nodes.name: FOLLOW UP : 2-3 MONTHS STATEMENTS REQUEST EMAIL

parameters.subject: Update on Your CMCA Application
parameters.message:
= Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Thank you for submitting your application to CMCA and providing the required information. Our underwriting team has completed a full review of your file.

At this time, we are unable to move forward with your application.

Please note that this decision reflects CMCA’s internal lending criteria and assessment process. While we cannot proceed at the moment, you are welcome to reapply in the future should your circumstances change or if you wish to submit a new application for consideration.

If you have questions about the application process or would like general guidance before reapplying, you may reply to this email and our team will be happy to assist you.

Thank you for considering CMCA.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

parameters.subject: Your Application Has Been Approved
parameters.message:
= Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Good news — your application for funding has been approved.

Our underwriting team has completed the initial assessment and determined that your business qualifies to move forward.

The next step is for us to connect and review the lending options available based on your file. During this call, we’ll walk you through the approved amounts, terms, and the structure that best supports your business.

We will contact you directly using the number on file to schedule this review. Once we connect, we’ll finalize the details and guide you through the remaining steps.

We look forward to assisting you.
Thank you for choosing CMCA

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

parameters.subject: Update on Your CMCA Application
parameters.message:
= Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Thank you for submitting your application and providing your information.

After reviewing your file, our underwriting team determined that your business is still at an early startup stage, which unfortunately falls outside of CMCA’s current lending criteria.

This is not a reflection of the quality of your business—only its stage of development. Many clients become eligible once they have additional operating history and stronger banking activity.

We would be pleased to reassess your application in the coming months once your business has:

  • A few more months of consistent operating activity
  • Regular business banking history
  • Steady incoming deposits

At that point, we can take a much closer look at potential financing options for you.

If you have questions or would like guidance on what to prepare for a future review, feel free to reply to this email. We’re here to support you as your business grows.

Thank you again for considering CMCA.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
